_doc: Fallen Empires (FEM) booster recipe. Generated by scripts/gen-booster-contents.mjs from data/_collation-facts/fem.json (source: The Collation Project, lethe.xyz/mtg/collation). Edit the facts file and regenerate; do not hand-edit this file unless you also remove its facts source. Collation: striped, 11x11 sheets; common sheet (C4/C3/C1) + uncommon sheet (U3/U2/U1). Pre-mythic era: rare slot is rare-only. Notes: Small set, 102 cards. Two print sheets only (common + uncommon); no distinct rare rarity. Many cards have multiple art variations per print. Page classes by print frequency so common/uncommon totals left null. Printed Belgium. 60 packs per box.
